hero.subtitle: Phase is your personal editorial storefront

mission.kicker: Creators inspire millions every single day
mission.heading: Phase is a space for creators to be seen
mission.paragraph: Only your raw concepts, your curated drops, and the community that stands by your side

steps.heading: Three steps to drops
steps.asideText: Everything you need to start receiving gifts without the friction

cards.title: Create your account
cards.text: Sign up in under a minute. Claim your unique name and make the space yours.

cards.title: Add your wishes
cards.text: Create lots: add a photo, title, price, and link to the item. Dream big — from a cup of coffee to a brand-new microphone.

cards.title: Share with your fans
cards.text: Copy your link and drop it in your bio, stories, or video description. Fans visit your storefront and gift you exactly what you want.

exhibition.title: Exhibition
exhibition.desc: A premium editorial layout featuring your aesthetic

capsules.title: Capsules
capsules.desc: Publish, modify your capsule drops instantly.

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.desc: Visitors get live updates on what’s currently available.

domain.title: Domain
domain.desc: A short, clean web address — phase.com/your-name.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: Discover what your audience interacts with most.
